examples: We visited Nimes and Arles, i. e. two ancient cities.
Frederic Mistral, born not far from Arles, devoted his life to literature and Provence.
All that is needed is the loan to Mistral's museum of a Van Gogh painting, created while he was in Arles.
When Vincent Van Gogh moved to Arles, France in 1887, he dreamed of starting an artist community.
For that reason, the Arles Office of Tourism features a Van Gogh walking tour of the town.
